headline: China's Zhejiang Province Reporting 1M Daily Covid Cases, Raising Supply Chain Concerns
Surging Electricity Prices Make Some Gas Vehicles Cheaper Than Electric Ones In Europe
summary:
Due to the Russia-Ukraine war, Europe was witnessing surging electricity prices, making some electric vehicles more expensive than combustion engines.

In some cases, the cost difference between driving both types of cars 100 miles had become negligible.

headline: Here's More Evidence Tesla's Cybertruck Could Soon Move Into Production
summary: Tesla Inc.’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) Cybertruck is the electric vehicle maker’s next major product and this long-awaited truck is expected to move into production in 2023.

headline: Amid Bitcoin's 66% YTD Loss, Peter Schiff Has This Christmas Advice For 'HODLers'
summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and its crypto cousins have all fallen sharply this year, along with other risky bets such as equities.

headline: 5 Logitech Gaming Headset Ideas For The Holiday Season
summary: The importance of good quality sound when playing video games cannot be underestimated: the experience can change completely if your headset fails, just as it can if the graphics are of poor quality.

headline: Delete WhatsApp, Telegram Founder Warns: What The Bezos Incident Shows Us About Meta's App
summary: WhatsApp "has now been a surveillance tool for 13 years," according to Telegram founder Pavel Durov, who says he deleted the Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) app from his devices "years ago."

headline: How To 'Turn' Your Tesla Into Santa's Sleigh On Christmas — And Other Easter Eggs
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) vehicle owners have a way of bolstering their Christmas spirit through features hidden within the vehicle's software.
